use_cases: Display animated loading state while content fetches
Show activity indicator during form submissions
Skeleton loader replacement for wait times
Process status indicator for background tasks
ai_summary: A customizable animated bar loader component that displays a row of vertical bars animating in a wave pattern to indicate loading or processing states. Each bar animates with staggered delays creating a rhythmic, cascading effect. Supports customization of bar count, dimensions, color, and animation speed through props.
